description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The exterior is clad in horizontal white siding, and large rectangular windows dominate both floors, allowing ample natural light inside. The front entryway is simple, featuring a single door flanked by manicured hedges and a short walkway leading to the street. A driveway on the right side accommodates a parked car, partially shielded by a privacy fence. Three tall, slender evergreen trees line one side of the property, adding greenery and privacy. The overall design emphasizes geometric lines, open space, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large windows, a flat roof, and minimalist landscaping including hedges and tall evergreens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, driveway with a parked car, hedges, and three tall evergreen trees.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the three tall evergreens and the privacy fence, with large windows visible on the upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, two large windows, and the absence of landscaping or entry features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hedges, walkway, and a large window, with minimal landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with a short walkway, flanked by manicured hedges and no porch or overhang.
